queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of loan duration in months on credit risk mitigation and default probability reduction.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical investigation into the role of lacking a checking account as a credit risk driver and its contribution to reduced default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: all previous credits at this bank paid back duly.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default associated with a credit history where all previous credits at this bank were paid back duly, focusing on its contribution to elevated credit risk.
